notes: Directory entries end with /. File entries do not.
Files at docs/ root must be enumerated explicitly (no directory-level rule applies to docs/).
framework-managed: framework owns; updates overwrite (with backup of any local copy).
hybrid: framework provides structure, adopter fills content; updates require user decision.
project-owned: adopter owns; framework never writes after install.
installer_generated: created by installer at adopter side; never compared to canonical.
excluded: exists in canonical repo but never shipped to adopters.

default_action_on_conflict semantics: 'skip' = keep local untouched; 'sibling' = write incoming as <name>.framework alongside local; 'overwrite-with-backup' = backup local to .framework-backup/ then overwrite with incoming.
More-specific entries override less-specific ones (file path beats directory path).
version is the framework release version (semver, no v prefix). manifest_schema_version is the schema version of THIS file's structure and bumps independently.
canonical_url is a full https URL. github_owner and github_repo are provided explicitly to avoid URL parsing in consumers.
